sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】富蘭克林綠色市政債ETF公告月配息，每股0.0597美元將於2月2日除息
feed.summary: |Franklin Municipal Green Bond ETF (FLMB) announced a monthly dividend distribution of $0.0597 per share. The ex-dividend date is set for February 2nd, which is also the record date. Eligible shareholders are expected to receive the dividend payment on February 5th.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) Price Target Cut to $78.00 by Analysts at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company analysts have reduced their price target for Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) shares from $82.00 to $78.00, while maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 13.71% from the stock's current price. The company recently reported quarterly earnings of $0.93 EPS, beating consensus estimates, and revenue of $1.61 billion, which was slightly below expectations but represented a 35.7% year-over-year increase.

feed.title: TD Cowens Cuts Target on e.l.f. Beauty (ELF) to $100
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reduced its target price for e.l.f. Beauty (ELF) to $100 from $110, while maintaining a Buy recommendation. This adjustment follows the release of ELF's Q3-FY2026 results, which showed a 38% year-over-year sales growth primarily driven by the "rhode" brand launch, but indicated minimal organic volume growth, leading analysts to anticipate slower revenue growth ahead. Despite this, ELF management increased its full-year net sales guidance.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Named Best-in-Class Cruise Operator by JPMorgan
feed.summary: JPMorgan has named Royal Caribbean (RCL) the "best-in-class operator" in the cruise sector, raising its price target to $371 and retaining an Overweight rating. This follows Royal Caribbean's Q4 2025 earnings announcement, where the company met analyst projections and predicted a double-digit rise in 2026 revenue and a 14% increase in full-year adjusted EPS. JPMorgan highlighted Royal Caribbean's competitive destination portfolio, including Perfect Day at Cococay, as a key differentiator.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern’s Stock On The Rails Again: What The Latest Rebound Really Tells Investors
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern's stock has shown a rebound despite past turbulence and the East Palestine derailment, suggesting investors are moving past reputational damage towards operational execution. Wall Street analysts are cautiously optimistic, maintaining "Buy" or "Overweight" ratings for some, while others hold "Neutral" stances, awaiting more consistent earnings. The company's future hinges on sustained progress in cost control, safety, and freight volume trends, with a "grind higher" being the most realistic outlook.

feed.title: Merck & Co. (MRK) Announces FDA Approval of KEYTRUDA and KEYTRUDA QLEX Plus Paclitaxel, With or Without Bevacizumab, to Treat Adults With PD-L1+
feed.summary: Merck & Co. announced FDA approval for KEYTRUDA® and KEYTRUDA QLEX™ plus paclitaxel, with or without bevacizumab, to treat adults with platinum-resistant epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal carcinoma with PD-L1+ tumors. This marks the first and only PD-1 inhibitors approved for this patient population. The approval is based on the Phase 3 KEYNOTE-B96 trial which showed a significant reduction in the risk of disease progression or death.

feed.title: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From MarketAxess's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: MarketAxess (MKTX) reported Q4 earnings with revenue below estimates but adjusted EPS above. The company's CEO, Christopher Concannon, addressed questions regarding block trading growth, fee compression, emerging markets strategy, growth outside U.S. credit, and AI ambitions. Analysts highlighted key areas like new trading protocols, automation, AI solutions, and market share capture as important indicators for future performance.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Reports 100% Success in OMNY-AF Study
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson announced 100% acute procedural success with no adverse events in the 12-month pilot phase of its OMNY-AF study, which investigates the OMNYPULSE Platform for treating symptomatic paroxysmal atrial fibrillation. This positive data was shared at the 31st Annual AF Symposium. Concurrently, RBC Capital raised J&J's price target to $255 from $240, reiterating an Outperform rating, despite ongoing talc litigation concerns, citing the company's strong financial position.

feed.title: Atmos Energy Corp.: How a Quiet Gas Utility Became a Critical Energy Infrastructure Platform
feed.summary: Atmos Energy Corp. is described as a critical energy infrastructure platform, operating one of the largest natural gas distribution networks in the U.S. The company focuses on grid resilience, safety technology, and regulated growth across fast-growing regions like Texas. With its strong capital investment, modernization programs, and a pure-play gas utility model, Atmos Energy aims for stable earnings and dividend growth, presenting itself as a dependable infrastructure investment.

feed.title: KeyBanc Raises Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) Price Target on Record Quarterly Revenue
feed.summary: KeyBanc has increased its price target for Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) to $1,500 from $1,300, maintaining an Overweight rating following strong fourth-quarter results and first-quarter forecasts. The company reported a record quarterly revenue of $751.2 million, exceeding expectations, primarily driven by momentum in its Data Center division. KeyBanc also noted that MPWR raised its 2026 Enterprise Data growth expectation to over 50%.

feed.title: FedEx stock price target raised to $405 from $330 at Stephens
feed.summary: Stephens has increased its price target for FedEx (NYSE:FDX) to $405 from $330, maintaining an Overweight rating, following FedEx's Investor Day event where the company outlined strategic growth plans including a focus on digitization and business-to-business segments. Other analysts like UBS and Bernstein SocGen Group have also raised their price targets, citing potential benefits from pricing strategies, cost control, and margin improvements. FedEx also announced a consistent quarterly cash dividend of $1.45 per share and a significant investment in InPost.

feed.title: Prudential Japan swamped by new misconduct complaints
feed.summary: Prudential Life Insurance Company, Ltd. (Prudential of Japan) has received approximately 300 new customer complaints regarding alleged monetary misconduct by its sales force, adding to an ongoing investigation into fraud and mis-selling. This surge in complaints led Prudential of Japan to voluntarily suspend new policy sales for 90 days starting February 9, while it addresses cases of mishandled customer money and inappropriate investments. The company plans to reimburse affected customers, revise sales incentive structures, and enhance oversight, with the misconduct cases dating back to 1991.

feed.title: Microsoft Explores Superconducting Power to Boost AI Data Centers
feed.summary: Microsoft is exploring the use of superconducting power lines in its data centers to enhance energy efficiency and support the expansion of its AI infrastructure in the U.S. This initiative addresses challenges posed by the country's aging power grid and electricity supply limitations. Piper Sandler has maintained an Overweight rating and a $600 price target for Microsoft, calling it a top pick for AI adoption.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Reduces Target Price on Galaxy Digital (GLXY) to $24, due to Weak Q4 Numbers
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reduced its target price on Galaxy Digital (GLXY) to $24 from $27, maintaining a Neutral call due to weaker-than-expected Q4 2025 results. The company missed street estimates for both revenue and loss per share, mainly attributed to a sharp depreciation in digital asset prices and a subsequent decline in key profit drivers. Despite the weak quarter, Galaxy Digital's management remains optimistic about long-term growth across its global markets and asset management segments.

feed.title: BofA Raises PT on Gilead Sciences (GILD) to $162 From $154 – Here’s Why
feed.summary: BofA has raised its price target for Gilead Sciences (GILD) to $162 from $154, maintaining a Buy rating. This upgrade follows Gilead's strong fiscal Q4 and full-year 2025 results, driven by the successful launch of Yeztugo and continued growth in HIV and Liver Disease products. The firm is confident in Gilead's 2026 growth prospects, no longer modeling Descovy sales cannibalization by Yeztugo.

feed.title: Wedbush Lifts PT on Biogen Inc. (BIIB) to $187 From $178 - Here's Why
feed.summary: Wedbush raised its price target on Biogen Inc. (BIIB) to $187 from $178, maintaining a Neutral rating, after the company exceeded fiscal Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results. RBC Capital also increased its price target to $233 from $217, citing stability and a strong foundation for future growth, while BMO Capital adjusted its target to $196 from $165. Biogen, a global biopharmaceutical company, develops therapies for various serious diseases, including MS, SMA, Alzheimer’s, and ALS.

feed.title: Cardinal Health, Inc. (NYSE:CAH) to Issue $0.51 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.5107 per share, payable on April 15th to shareholders of record as of April 1st. This dividend represents an annualized payment of $2.04 with a yield of approximately 0.9%, and the company has consistently increased its dividend for 29 consecutive years, maintaining a payout ratio of about 22.5%. The announcement follows a strong quarterly earnings report where Cardinal Health exceeded analyst expectations with EPS of $2.63 and revenue of $65.63 billion.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz faces class action over ‘naturally flavored’ Country Time lemonade
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz is being sued in a class action lawsuit alleging false advertising of its Country Time lemonade products. Plaintiffs claim the products are marketed as "No Artificial Flavors" and "Naturally Flavored" but contain artificial ingredients like citric acid and maltodextrin that impart flavor. Consumers allegedly paid a premium based on these misrepresentations and would not have purchased the product or would have paid less had they known the true nature of the ingredients.

feed.title: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:GEHC) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.04
feed.summary: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:GEHC) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.035 per share, payable on May 15th to shareholders of record on April 3rd, with an ex-dividend date of April 2nd. This dividend represents an annualized yield of 0.2% and is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 3.0%. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.44 against a consensus of $1.40 and revenue of $5.70 billion, and provided positive FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $1.13
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.13 per share, totaling an annualized dividend of $4.52 and a 4.3% yield. Despite a 58-year history of dividend increases, the current payout ratio stands at 141.2%, indicating that recent dividends are being funded from the balance sheet, although analysts project a more sustainable future payout ratio of around 60.9% for next year. The company recently missed EPS expectations but beat revenue in its latest quarter, with FY2026 EPS guidance set between $7.420 and $7.520.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Raises FedEx (NYSE:FDX) Price Target to $364.00
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has increased its price target for FedEx (NYSE:FDX) to $364.00, suggesting a minor potential downside from the current share price but aligning with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating. This adjustment follows FedEx's strong quarterly performance, where it surpassed EPS and revenue estimates, and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance. Institutional investors, including Norges Bank and Vanguard, have significantly boosted their holdings in the company.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials stock price target lowered by Stephens to $735 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Stephens has lowered its price target for Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) to $735 from $740, while maintaining an Overweight rating. This adjustment follows the company missing Stephens’ fourth-quarter estimates for aggregates average selling price and volume growth, and its consolidated EBITDA guidance for 2026 also fell short of expectations. Despite the lowered target and a premium P/E ratio, Stephens noted positive factors like the pending Quikrete swap closure and Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act reauthorization discussions, with the company showcasing a 32-year history of dividend payments and 10 consecutive years of dividend raises.

feed.title: Price Over Earnings Overview: U.S. Bancorp
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) stock recently dropped by 0.93% but has seen significant gains over the past month and year. The company's P/E ratio of 12.52 is lower than the Banks industry aggregate of 15.76, which could suggest undervaluation or potentially weaker future performance compared to peers. Investors are cautioned to use the P/E ratio as just one of many metrics when evaluating a company's financial health.

feed.title: Brookfield Property Partners stock hits 52-week high at $16.27
feed.summary: Brookfield Property Partners LP's preferred stock (BPYPP) has reached a new 52-week high of $16.27, reflecting positive performance and investor confidence. The stock offers an impressive 10.01% dividend yield and has demonstrated low price volatility with a beta of 0.15. This milestone highlights strong recovery and growth potential for the company.

feed.title: FERMI INC. (NASDAQ: FRMI) SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for investors of FERMI INC. (NASDAQ: FRMI), reminding them of an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased Fermi securities between October 1, 2025, and December 11, 2025, or pursuant to its October 2025 IPO, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal options, with the lead plaintiff deadline set for March 6, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that misrepresentations were made in the Company's Registration Statement regarding tenant demand at its Project Matador campus.

feed.title: Parker Scheduled to Present at Citi’s 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 19 at 11:20 a.m. Eastern Time
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation, a global leader in motion and control technologies, will present at Citi’s 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 19, 2026, at 11:20 a.m. Eastern time. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on their investor relations website. The company has a strong record of increasing its annual dividend for 69 consecutive years.

feed.title: Elbit Systems Rides The Defense Boom, But The Valuation Is Stretched (NASDAQ:ESLT)
feed.summary: Elbit Systems (ESLT) is rated Hold due to its stretched valuation, which already reflects the defense boom and record backlog. The current share price implies years of double-digit growth and margin expansion, leaving little margin for error. Risks include potential order slowdowns, rising costs, supply chain issues, and increased competition, suggesting upside only through explosive earnings growth or a re-rating to a more reasonable multiple.

feed.title: Advocates ask regulators to reconsider Georgia Power expansion
feed.summary: Environmental groups are urging the Georgia Public Service Commission to reconsider its December approval of Georgia Power's energy expansion plan. They argue the expansion, primarily driven by anticipated data center demand and heavily reliant on natural gas, is excessive even by the utility's own predictions and could unfairly burden ordinary customers while contributing to climate change. The petition for reconsideration was added to the commission's agenda for the following week, with new commissioners advocating for due consideration of the request.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace: Premium Valuation Justified By Rare Multi-Year Growth (NYSE:HWM)
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM) exhibits rare alignment of growth engines, strong incremental margins, and rising spare parts demand, supported by multi-year visibility from defense, aerospace, and data center gas turbine demand. Despite a demanding valuation, its durable growth, backlog extending to 2030, and expanding turbine exposure justify a "Buy" rating for risk-aware investors. The company maintains a conservative balance sheet and disciplined capital allocation.

feed.title: From Crisis to Comeback: How Dow Inc Became 2026’s Unlikely Winner
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) stock has surprisingly surged 40% year-to-date in 2026 despite a significant net loss in 2025. This turnaround is attributed to an aggressive restructuring program targeting $2 billion in additional earnings through job cuts and AI investment. While the market shows confidence in the execution, potential risks include technical overbought indicators, recent insider selling, and cautious analyst ratings, suggesting investors are betting on future success rather than delivered results.

feed.title: This Dollar Tree Analyst Turns Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Friday
feed.summary: This article highlights five key stock downgrades by top Wall Street analysts on Friday. Among them, Dollar Tree (DLTR) saw a downgrade from "Market Perform" to "Underperform" by BMO Capital, with its price target reduced from $110 to $95. Other companies receiving downgrades include Domo (DOMO), IPG Photonics (IPGP), Pinterest (PINS), and US Foods Holding (USFD), along with revised price targets.

feed.title: Generac Holdings Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (GNRC) has significantly outperformed the broader market and the Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLI) over the past year, driven by strong growth in its Commercial & Industrial segment and strategic investments. Despite missing Wall Street's Q4 expectations for both EPS and revenue, analysts project a 27.9% EPS growth for fiscal 2026. The consensus analyst rating is a "Moderate Buy," with a price target of $255 from TD Cowen, suggesting potential upside.

feed.title: Imperial Oil (TSX:IMO) Valuation Check After Dividend Hike And Record Production Milestone
feed.summary: Imperial Oil (TSX:IMO) has seen an 18.92% share price return in 30 days and a 63.24% one-year total shareholder return, driven by a 20% quarterly dividend increase, record annual production guidance, and higher operating cash flows. While a popular narrative suggests the stock is 37.3% overvalued with a fair value of CA$115.41, a discounted cash flow model indicates it might be undervalued by 49.1% at CA$311.53. The article explores these differing valuations and potential risks for investors.

feed.title: FactSet (FDS) Target Lowered by Wells Fargo Amid AI Concerns in Info Services
feed.summary: Wells Fargo lowered its price target on FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) to $215 from $265, maintaining an Underweight rating due to broader weakness in the information services sector amidst AI concerns. Despite this, Wells Fargo suggested the market's reaction might be overdone, seeing opportunities for companies with defensible proprietary data. FactSet recently announced a partnership with Kepler Cheuvreux to integrate its aftermarket research, enhanced by FactSet's AI tools, into its platform.

feed.title: TD Cowen Presented a Bullish Stance on Franklin Resources (BEN)
feed.summary: TD Cowen's Bill Katz upgraded his price recommendation for Franklin Resources (BEN) to $36 from $30, maintaining a Hold rating after reviewing the company's Q4 results and becoming more optimistic about its outlook. This bullish stance is further supported by Franklin Resources' new initiative with Binance, launching an institutional off-exchange collateral program that enhances security and capital efficiency for digital market participation. The program allows eligible institutional clients to use tokenized money market fund shares as collateral, reducing counterparty risks by keeping assets off-exchange while still facilitating trading on Binance.

feed.title: Booking Holdings stock hits 52-week low at $4,092
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. stock has hit a 52-week low of $4,092, representing a 30% drop from its 52-week high, with a 16.35% fall over the past year and a 23.38% drop in the last six months. Despite market challenges, the company maintains impressive 87% gross profit margins and a "GREAT" financial health score from InvestingPro. The article also notes recent positive third-quarter performance, varied analyst ratings from Goldman Sachs, Mizuho, KeyBanc, and Citizens, and leadership changes at KAYAK.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin stock hits all-time high at 647.57 USD
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin stock reached an all-time high of $647.57, reflecting a significant 50.63% increase over the past year. This achievement is attributed to strong investor confidence in the company's strategic initiatives and the rising global demand for advanced military technology. Analysts have raised price targets for Lockheed Martin, citing robust financial performance and growth in key defense segments.

feed.title: General Dynamics Paid Investors $1.50: Here’s What the Dividend Reveals
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) recently paid a quarterly dividend of $1.50 per share, extending a 27-year streak of consecutive payments. This dividend reflects a 5.6% increase from the previous year, supported by a strong financial foundation including $4 billion in free cash flow and a record $118 billion backlog. The company maintains a conservative 40.2% payout ratio, signaling sustainability and potential for continued growth despite near-term tariff impacts and increased capital expenditures.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Best Buy to $67 From $82, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Best Buy (BBY) to $67 from $82, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for the consumer electronics retailer, including Jefferies and JPMorgan, who also recently updated their targets and ratings. Best Buy specializes in the retail distribution of consumer electronic products across the United States and Canada.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) Stock Price Expected to Rise, DA Davidson Analyst Says
feed.summary: DA Davidson has increased its target price for Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) to $125 from $115, maintaining a "Buy" rating and suggesting a 19.49% upside. Despite this, the overall analyst consensus for AKAM is a "Hold" with an average price target of $97.50, which is below the current trading price. Company insiders have recently been net sellers, disposing of over 28,000 shares worth approximately $2.59 million in the last three months, though they still own about 2% of the company.

feed.title: FactSet (FDS) Target Lowered by Wells Fargo Amid AI Concerns in Info Services
feed.summary: Wells Fargo lowered its price target on FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) to $215 from $265, maintaining an Underweight rating due to broader weakness in the information services sector amidst AI concerns. Despite this, Wells Fargo believes the sell-off might be overdone for companies with strong proprietary data. FactSet recently partnered with Kepler Cheuvreux to integrate its Aftermarket Research, enhanced by FactSet's AI tools, expanding its offerings in EMEA.

feed.title: Corteva Offers Cattle Producers Options To Improve Pasture Conditions
feed.summary: Corteva Agriscience is offering cattle producers two herbicide options, DuraCor® and NovaGraz™, to improve pasture conditions and enhance forage utilization. DuraCor® provides broadleaf weed control with no grazing restrictions, while NovaGraz™ allows for the preservation of white clover, offering flexibility in pasture management. These products aim to eliminate unwanted weeds and brush, enabling productive grasses to thrive for healthier cattle.

feed.title: Argus Research Upgrades McDonald's (MCD) to Buy with $380 Target
feed.summary: Argus Research has upgraded McDonald's (MCD) from Hold to Buy, setting a new price target of $380. This upgrade, announced by analyst John Staszak, reflects a positive outlook for the stock and follows similar positive adjustments from several other analysts. McDonald's, the world's largest restaurant brand, is receiving increased bullish sentiment from Wall Street, with an average target price of $343.52 among 33 analysts.

feed.title: Cytokinetics to Announce Fourth Quarter Results on February 24, 2026
feed.summary: Cytokinetics, Incorporated announced it is scheduled to report its fourth-quarter results on February 24, 2026, at 4:00 PM Eastern Time. Following the announcement, senior management will host a conference call at 4:30 PM Eastern Time to discuss financial results and provide business updates, which will be webcast on the company's website. The company also provided an overview of its pipeline, including MYQORZO™ (aficamten) for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, and investigational medicines omecamtiv mecarbil and ulacamten for heart failure.

feed.title: Melco Resorts & Entertainment Limited (NASDAQ:MLCO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Melco Resorts & Entertainment Limited (NASDAQ:MLCO) reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with group property EBITDA growing 17% in 2025. The company highlighted significant recovery and growth in Macau, driven by enhanced customer experience and a strong start to 2026. Despite competitive pressures in the Philippines, Melco is optimistic about market improvements and is undertaking strategic developments like the renovation of the Countdown Hotel in Macau.

feed.title: Facioscapulohumeral Muscular Dystrophy Market: High-Growth Opportunities for Investors to 2034 - DelveInsight | Dyne Therapeutics, miRecule, Avidity Biosciences, aTyr Pharma, Fulcrum Therapeutics
feed.summary: The Facioscapulohumeral Muscular Dystrophy (FSHD) market is projected for significant growth between 2020 and 2034, driven by increasing prevalence, awareness, and the launch of pipeline products. Key companies like Avidity Biosciences and Fulcrum Therapeutics are advancing therapies, with several clinical trial milestones and funding rounds noted for 2024 and 2025. The market analysis by DelveInsight covers epidemiology, treatment trends within the 7MM (United States, EU4, UK, Japan), and highlights promising emerging therapies.

feed.title: First Bancorp director Herencia sells $106,895 in stock
feed.summary: First BanCorp director Roberto R. Herencia sold 4,723 shares of the company's common stock for $106,895 on February 11, 2026. Following this transaction, Herencia directly owns 637,019 shares. The sale occurred while the stock trades near its 52-week high, boasts a 13.5% return over the past year, and maintains a 3.57% dividend yield.

feed.title: Stifel Cuts Essex Property Trust (ESS) PT to $278 After Q4 Review, Keeps Hold
feed.summary: Stifel has lowered its price target for Essex Property Trust (ESS) to $278 from $290.75, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment follows the company's Q4 2025 earnings review, where Essex reported strong full-year same-store revenue growth and FFO per share that exceeded expectations, particularly in Northern California. The REIT specializes in apartment communities on the West Coast, with highlights including strong occupancy rates and significant investment in Northern California.

feed.title: Citi Raises Becton Dickinson (BDX) PT to $198 after Life Sciences Sale Update
feed.summary: Citi analyst Joanne Wuensch increased her price target for Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE: BDX) to $198 from $185.70, maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment follows an update to Citi's financial model to reflect the sale of BDX's Life Sciences business. BDX's fiscal Q1 2026 earnings exceeded expectations with $5.3 billion in revenue, and the company plans a $4 billion cash distribution from the Life Sciences sale, allocating $2 billion to share repurchases and $2 billion to debt reduction.

feed.title: Ecolab (ECL) Analyst Rating Update: BMO Capital Boosts Price Tar
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for Ecolab (ECL) to $345.00, maintaining an "Outperform" rating, indicating continued confidence in the company's performance. This follows similar price target raises and "Outperform" or "Buy" ratings from other analysts like Exane BNP Paribas, Stifel, Citigroup, and RBC Capital. Ecolab, a global leader in cleaning and sanitation products, currently has an average target price of $317.63 from 20 analysts, suggesting a potential upside of 5.63%.
